sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27055" key="di/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐ´-λογος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">double-tongued, doubtful,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:3:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
